title: The intersection complex as a weight truncation and an application to Shimura varieties
abstract: The purpose of this talk is to present an (apparently) new way to look at the intersection complex of a singular variety over a finite field, or, more generally, at the intermediate extension functor on pure perverse sheaves, and an application of this to the cohomology of noncompact Shimura varieties.
comment: 20 pages, notes of my 2010 ICM talk
